programme.desc: Presenter Helen Skelton and expert garden designer Danny Clarke bring unloved gardens back to life in a single day using clever design, imaginative ideas and recycling. (HD)

programme.title: Yes Chef

programme.title: Posh Pawn

programme.title: Building Giants

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories

programme.desc: Tugann na Trí Bhéar faoin stáitse nuair a bhíonn an banna ceoil tinn. (The Three Bears step in to help when the band are too ill to play in the show.)

programme.title: Fíricí Fíochmhara
programme.desc: Beidh John an coimeádaí zú ag beathú capaillíní as Inse Shealtainn agus as an Airgintín! (Today, zookeeper John prepares a meal for ponies from the Shetland Islands and Argentina!)

programme.title: Pip & Posy
programme.desc: Nuair a chailleann Posy eitleog Phip, cumann sí scéal gur goideadh uaithi í. (When Posy loses Pip's kite, she makes up a story about a big girl taking it.)

programme.title: Saol Faoi Shráid
programme.desc: Ní bhíonn Cící ró-chairdiúil le Ribín nuair a thagann sí abhaile ó chomórtas amhránaíochta. (Cící returns from a big singing competition on her return she hurts Ribín's feelings.)

programme.title: Bígí ag Ceol
programme.desc: Daltaí Ghaelscoil Thaobh na Coille, An Chéim a bheidh i mbun cumadóireachta inniu. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)

programme.title: Curious George
programme.desc: Cuireann George aithne ar choilíneacht béabhar. (George gets to know a colony of beavers.)

programme.title: Nuair a Bheidh Mé Mór
programme.desc: Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina bitheolaí nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a biologist with the help of the Job Fairy.)

programme.title: Zou
programme.desc: Tá duine éigin ag faire ar Zou inniu. Ach meas tú cé atá ann? (Zou has a secret admirer today. But who could it be?)

programme.title: Dee Dee
programme.desc: Tá Bella ag foghlaim teanga Tika Pila. Cén draíocht a bheidh ag Deedee inniu? (Bella is learning how to speak Tika Pila's language. What magic will DeeDee be using today?)

programme.title: Ainmhithe Craiceáilte
programme.desc: Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh madra ag ní éadaí, cat óg ag léim thar sconsa agus firéid spraíúla. (Today a dog does the laundry and a kitten jumps for the fences.)

programme.title: Malcolm in the Middle
programme.desc: Tugann Lois an chlann chuig comhdháil daorchluiche. (Lois takes the kids to a baseball convention.)

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Tugann Carla cuireadh do lucht Cheers chuig a teach do Lá an Altaithe. (Carla invites the gang to her house for a Thanksgiving potluck.)

programme.title: Tour de France - Súil Siar
programme.desc: Buaicphointí ó chéim 5 de Tour de France 2026 ó Lannemezam go Pau. (All the best action from stage 5 of the Tour de France 2026 from Lannemezam to Pau.)

programme.title: Tour de France Beo
programme.desc: Tabharfaidh na rothaithe faoi 186 km inniu, ag dul ó Pau go Gavarnie-Gèdre. (Today the cyclists undertake 186 km from Pau to Gavarnie-Gèdre.)

programme.title: Réabhlóid ar Chúl an Tí
programme.desc: Réitíonn Mary Reynolds gairdín le hais teach nua i gCorca Dhuibhne. (Mary Reynolds creates a garden for a newly built home in Corca Dhuibhne.)

programme.title: Planda go Pláta
programme.desc: Muisiriúin is ábhar don chlár seo. Beidh Rebecca in Uíbh Fhailí agus Niall sa chistin. (Rebecca is in Offaly and Niall is in the kitchen, they are both cooking with mushrooms.)

programme.title: Croí na Féile
programme.desc: Is i mBéal Feirste a bheidh Hugh Carr an tseachtain seo agus é ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Oireachtas na Samhna. (This week Hugh Carr heads to Belfast to Oireachtas na Samhna.)

programme.title: Seal le Dáithí
programme.desc: Is é Billy Mag Fhloinn a bheidh ag caitheamh seal le Dáithí ar an gclár. (Dáithí Ó Sé will be chatting with Billy Mag Fhloinn on the show.)

programme.title: Fíorscéal
